audience: Business owners, marketers and communications leads at SMEs that want to publish professional video regularly on LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube or TikTok
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's helpen een herhaalbaar social-videosysteem te bouwen dat doelen, formats, productie, platformversies, toegankelijkheid, publicatie en meting met elkaar verbindt

searchIntent.question: How can an SME plan, produce and measure a sustainable series of social media videos?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs in Belgium, particularly Limburg and Flanders, publishing across major social platforms

longTailKeywords: social media video strategy for small businesses
how to create social media videos for business
directAnswer: Social media video works for an SME when each clip answers one recognisable audience question, serves a defined business goal and is adapted to its channel. Plan repeatable formats, record modular material in one focused production day, create platform-specific versions and measure the next action rather than views alone.
title: Social media video for SMEs: from content plan to measurable series
metaDescription: Plan social media video for your SME: choose goals, formats and channels, then turn one production day into a measurable series of vertical videos.
h1: Social media video for SMEs: from content plan to measurable series

internalLinks.anchor: why invest in a corporate video

factsToPreserve: A social clip is a complete idea designed for a specific viewing moment, not merely a shortened corporate film
Professional quality chiefly requires intelligible sound, reliable images, a clear message, suitable rights and a publication-ready version
Platform limits change and official specifications must be checked for each campaign
The platform specifications cited are dated 12 July 2026
Instagram Reels accepts upload ratios from 1.91:1 to 9:16 with at least 720 pixels and 30 frames per second according to the cited Meta guidance
LinkedIn ordinary uploads are cited as supporting ratios from 1:2.4 to 2.4:1, resolutions from 256 by 144 to 4096 by 2304 and a maximum duration of 15 minutes
Square or vertical YouTube uploads up to three minutes have been categorised as Shorts since 15 October 2024, subject to exceptions and music rights
TikTok ratios cited come from advertising documentation and are not a universal promise for every organic feature
Automatic captions require review, particularly for names, dialect, specialist terms and figures
Platform view definitions differ and views alone must not be treated as a business outcome
No publishing frequency, format, duration or result is presented as universally correct or guaranteed
